2605.28164.title: Performance and Explainability Requirements of Evolutionary Algorithms in Real-World Physics-Informed Optimization
2605.28164.paper_summary: Evolutionary computation offers a variety of tools to solve complex real-world optimization problems. However, research often focuses on smaller, simplified problems and optimization algorithms that sometimes miss expectations in real-world scenarios. Additionally, trust in the applied algorithm and the solutions it provides is often essential in such settings, but requires an understanding of the search process itself. This leads to evolutionary computation often not being seriously considered by practitioners in many application contexts, among them physics-based modeling. In this article, techniques from evolutionary computation are detailed that can alleviate these problems. First, five real-world physics-based optimization problems are introduced and described by domain experts. For each of these, the requirements for the evolutionary algorithm regarding performance and explainability to increase trust and usability are presented. We found that all domain experts expect fast convergence to a good solution and want some explanations for how the results were formed, while other requirements strongly depend on the respective problem. Finally, we present existing approaches that can be leveraged to improve those aspects of evolutionary algorithms but have to our knowledge never been employed in complex real-world scenarios. This implies a gap between both domains that needs to be closed to exploit the full potential of evolutionary computation.
2605.28164.paper_summary_zh: 進化計算提供了多種工具來解決複雜的現實世界優化問題。<lb/>然而，研究往往專注於較小、簡化的問題和優化算法，這些算法在現實世界場景中有時未能達到預期。<lb/>此外，在這些環境中，對所應用算法及其提供的解決方案的信任通常是至關重要的，但這需要對搜索過程本身的理解。<lb/>這導致進化計算在許多應用上下文中，尤其是基於物理的建模，往往未被實踐者認真考慮。<lb/>在本文中，我們詳細介紹了可以緩解這些問題的進化計算技術。<lb/>首先，介紹了五個現實世界中基於物理的優化問題，並由領域專家進行描述。<lb/>對於這些問題，提出了進化算法在性能和可解釋性方面的要求，以提高信任度和可用性。<lb/>我們發現所有領域專家都期望快速收斂到良好的解決方案，並希望對結果的形成過程有一些解釋，而其他要求則強烈依賴於各自的問題。<lb/>最後，我們提出了現有的方法，可以用來改善進化算法的這些方面，但據我們所知，這些方法從未在複雜的現實世界場景中應用過。<lb/>這意味著兩個領域之間存在著一個需要填補的空白，以充分發揮進化計算的潛力。
2605.28164.author: Helena Stegherr et.al.
2605.28164.authors: Helena Stegherr, Michael Heider, Nils Meyer, Tobias Thummerer, Thomas Wendler, Pierre Aublin, Ennio Idrobo-Àvila, Lars Mikelsons, Sebastian Zaunseder, Jörg Hähner
